name: SQL - Get count of Appointments with NULL Appointment Date

content.query:
SELECT 
'FHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_app_Appointments]
 where [ApptDate] is null
 

 UNION
 
 SELECT 
'PHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_app_Appointments]
 where [ApptDate] is null

UNION

SELECT 
'HSI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_app_Appointments]
 where [ApptDate] is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'PBC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_app_Appointments]
 where [ApptDate] is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'RTW' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_app_Appointments]
 where [ApptDate] is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'SWR' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_app_Appointments]
 where [ApptDate] is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'MAC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_app_Appointments]
 where [ApptDate] is null
